title: English 12 Reflection, Journal, and Short Response Comments
description: English 12 starter comment bank for reflection, journal, and short response aligned to grades 11-12 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.

categories.label: Text Connection
categories.description: Reusable review items for text connection.

categories.label: Next Steps
categories.description: Reusable review items for next steps.

comments.label: Focus strength
comments.short_text: Your focus answers the prompt or reflective purpose directly, which helps the reader understand the work with precisi....
comments.text: Your focus answers the prompt or reflective purpose directly, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen focus?
comments.revision_action: Keep this focus move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Focus developing
comments.short_text: Your focus is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you tighten the response around one main idea.
comments.text: Your focus is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you tighten the response around one main idea.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen focus?
comments.revision_action: Tighten the response around one main idea.

comments.label: Text Connection strength
comments.short_text: Your text connection connects the response to a specific text or moment, which helps the reader understand the work w....
comments.text: Your text connection connects the response to a specific text or moment, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen text connection?
comments.revision_action: Keep this text connection move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Text Connection developing
comments.short_text: Your text connection is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you refer to a specific part of the text or ex....
comments.text: Your text connection is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you refer to a specific part of the text or experience.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen text connection?
comments.revision_action: Refer to a specific part of the text or experience.

comments.label: Evidence strength
comments.short_text: Your evidence uses evidence that fits the point being made, which helps the reader understand the work with precision....
comments.text: Your evidence uses evidence that fits the point being made, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen evidence?
comments.revision_action: Keep this evidence move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Evidence developing
comments.short_text: Your evidence is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose evidence that is more direct or more fully....
comments.text: Your evidence is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose evidence that is more direct or more fully introduced.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen evidence?
comments.revision_action: Choose evidence that is more direct or more fully introduced.

comments.label: Explanation strength
comments.short_text: Your explanation makes the thinking easy for the reader to follow, which helps the reader understand the work with pr....
comments.text: Your explanation makes the thinking easy for the reader to follow, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen explanation?
comments.revision_action: Keep this explanation move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Explanation developing
comments.short_text: Your explanation is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you explain the evidence or connection rather than....
comments.text: Your explanation is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you explain the evidence or connection rather than listing it.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen explanation?
comments.revision_action: Explain the evidence or connection rather than listing it.

comments.label: Reflection strength
comments.short_text: Your reflection connects experience to meaning or growth, which helps the reader understand the work with precision a....
comments.text: Your reflection connects experience to meaning or growth, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen reflection?
comments.revision_action: Keep this reflection move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Reflection developing
comments.short_text: Your reflection is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add reflection that shows what changed or what ....
comments.text: Your reflection is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add reflection that shows what changed or what the moment means.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen reflection?
comments.revision_action: Add reflection that shows what changed or what the moment means.

comments.label: Depth strength
comments.short_text: Your depth goes beyond first thoughts into fuller reflection, which helps the reader understand the work with precisi....
comments.text: Your depth goes beyond first thoughts into fuller reflection, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen depth?
comments.revision_action: Keep this depth move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Depth developing
comments.short_text: Your depth is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add why, how, or so what thinking.
comments.text: Your depth is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you add why, how, or so what thinking.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen depth?
comments.revision_action: Add why, how, or so what thinking.

comments.label: Clarity strength
comments.short_text: Your clarity uses clear sentences and organization, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and att....
comments.text: Your clarity uses clear sentences and organization, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen clarity?
comments.revision_action: Keep this clarity move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Clarity developing
comments.short_text: Your clarity is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you revise wording or sequence where the reader may ge....
comments.text: Your clarity is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you revise wording or sequence where the reader may get lost.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen clarity?
comments.revision_action: Revise wording or sequence where the reader may get lost.

comments.label: Conventions strength
comments.short_text: Your conventions keeps sentence control from distracting the reader, which helps the reader understand the work with ....
comments.text: Your conventions keeps sentence control from distracting the reader, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conventions?
comments.revision_action: Keep this conventions move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Conventions developing
comments.short_text: Your conventions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usag....
comments.text: Your conventions is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usage patterns that interrupt meaning.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen conventions?
comments.revision_action: Edit sentence boundaries, punctuation, or usage patterns that interrupt meaning.

comments.label: Next Steps strength
comments.short_text: Your next steps names a practical next step for revision or thinking, which helps the reader understand the work with....
comments.text: Your next steps names a practical next step for revision or thinking, which helps the reader understand the work with precision and attention to complexity.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen next steps?
comments.revision_action: Keep this next steps move and apply it in another paragraph or section.

comments.label: Next Steps developing
comments.short_text: Your next steps is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose one clear revision action and complete it.
comments.text: Your next steps is on the right track, but it will be stronger if you choose one clear revision action and complete it.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What is one place where you can strengthen next steps?
comments.revision_action: Choose one clear revision action and complete it.

comments.label: Focus hard to follow
comments.short_text: The focus is difficult to follow right now.
comments.text: The focus is difficult to follow right now. Revisit this part first so the reader can understand the purpose of the writing.
comments.teacher_note: Use when focus is a major barrier to understanding.
comments.follow_up_prompt: Where should the student begin revising focus?
comments.revision_action: Rewrite the section that most affects focus before polishing sentences.

comments.label: Text Connection hard to follow
comments.short_text: The text connection is difficult to follow right now.
comments.text: The text connection is difficult to follow right now. Revisit this part first so the reader can understand the purpose of the writing.

comments.label: Conventions next revision pass
comments.short_text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, comple....
comments.text: For the next revision pass, focus on conventions: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, complexity, or audience impact.
comments.follow_up_prompt: What single revision move would most improve conventions?
comments.revision_action: Make one focused pass for conventions and then reread the full piece.

comments.label: Next Steps next revision pass
comments.short_text: For the next revision pass, focus on next steps: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, complex....
comments.text: For the next revision pass, focus on next steps: Revise one moment so the explanation addresses significance, complexity, or audience impact.

module_details.notice: These materials are teacher-editable starter review materials aligned to common high school ELA writing tasks and 2023 NJSLS-ELA references. They are not official state curriculum, not district grading policy, and not automatic evaluation.
module_details.emphasis: precise and knowledgeable claims, significance, logical sequencing of claims and counterclaims, strongest relevant evidence, avoidance of fallacies, synthesis, sophisticated style, audience awareness, complexity, ambiguity, nuance, and independent revision.
